text.title: C# ASP.NET Core + EF Core Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a feature-folder artefact (Controller + Service + DTO + EntityConfig + test).

step.name: classify-feature
step.action: Apply decision tree on stack/runtime. If target is edge function, BFF, or non-CRUD, route to appropriate methodology and STOP.
step.decision-gate: If decision != ASP.NET Core CRUD/RPC feature, STOP.

step.name: entity-and-config
step.action: Define entity in `Domain/` (sealed, parameterless protected ctor for EF). Write `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>` with HasKey + property-level constraints + indexes. Register via `modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly`.

step.name: service-layer
step.action: Define `I<Feature>Service` in `Services/`. Implementation takes scoped `DbContext` + dependencies via constructor. Each method accepts `CancellationToken ct`. Read paths use `.AsNoTracking().Select(dto)`.

step.name: controller-and-dto
step.action: Define request/response `record` DTOs in `Dtos/`. Controller carries `[ApiController]` + `[Route("api/[controller]")]`, inherits `ControllerBase`, accepts `CancellationToken`, returns `ActionResult<TResponse>` with appropriate `[ProducesResponseType]`.

step.name: xunit-slice-test
step.action: Write xUnit `WebApplicationFactory<Program>`-based slice test or pure unit test mocking `I<Feature>Service`. Assert HTTP status + JSON shape.
step.decision-gate: If the test requires real DB to pass, the service layer is not properly isolated — refactor before merging.
